response.step_by_step_log: 1. The video was reviewed for background music and vocal performance. 2. Only in-game audio and the streamer's commentary were identified. 3. No background songs with vocals were detected in this segment. 4. Consequently, no lyrics search was performed, and all music-related fields in the JSON are set to null.
response.global_summary: A continuous video segment from a Minecraft stream, featuring a VTuber performing various in-game tasks such as harvesting crops, managing inventory items, and trading with villagers in a marketplace. There is no background vocal music present in this video, only game audio and the streamer's commentary.

scenes.description: The streamer is busy harvesting crops in their farm area and checking beehives and inventory items.
The streamer travels through the game world away from the farm area towards a trading marketplace.
The streamer is at a trading stall, selling items like carrots and bees to a villager.
The streamer travels back towards the farm and inventory area.
The streamer returns to trading at the marketplace, selling more items.
The streamer navigates through the world and visits another section of the marketplace.
The streamer uses furnaces to smelt raw iron items.
